name: Candied Pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat cold water and egg white until frothy.
2. Mix well with pecans.
3. Combine sugar, ground cinnamon, and salt with the pecans.
4. Spread on a cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 225°F for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
Colorado Cache Cookbook (1978) From the collection of Jim Vorheis
